examples: The longer I live alone the more proprietorial I become about my home.
So Brazil feels proprietorial about the tournament, which it is to host in 2014.
Economic growth is originated from the rationalization of proprietorial system.
Egypt, which has always had a deep, rather proprietorial, concern for Sudan, has chosen this moment for a new initiative.
And the unification of consumer lenders' jealously guarded proprietorial credit databases into a national whole would remove an important barrier to entry.
